THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIACOTOS, HARRIET TRUSTEE OF THE NICK AND HARRIET SIACOTOS LIVING TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, PENELOPE DOES 1 TO 10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1475 48TH AVENUE, #2, SAN FRANCISCO, ***INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIACOTOS, HARRIET TRUSTEE OF THE NICK AND HARRIET SIACOTOS LIVING TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, PENELOPE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, PENELOPE
